Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell. (See also 7-15-04, Dept. 218's calendar.)
Zuzana J. Svihra, Esq. for Cross-Complainants: Transatlantic SPV-I, Ltd., Pacific Aircorp 46944, Inc. and Pacific Aircorp 46945, Inc.
No appearance by the Defaulted Cross-Defendant: Luc Mellearts.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
The Default jugment entered against Cross-Defendants: Interscalades Management & Consultancy, Nv and IMC International Management Company, BV on July 15, 2004 be AMENDED to add Cross-Defendant: Luc Mellaerts as a Judgment Debtor on the grounds that he is the alter ego of IMC and Interscaldes and he is individually liable for conversion and fraudulent misappropriation and conveyance as alleged against him in the Cross-Complaint.
Counsel to prepare an AMENDED JUDGMENT.
July 22, 2004
Proposed ORDER amending the Default Judgment received and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See details of the AMENDED JUDGMENT in scanned doc.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Cross-Complaints' Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Zuzana J. Svihra, Esq. for Cross-Complainants: Transatlantis SPV-I, Ltd., Pacific Aircorp 46944, Inc. and Pacific Aircorp 46945, Inc.
Cross-Complainants' witness: Philip V. Jackmauh, Christian Dumortier and Scott Cryer, were sworn & examined.
The Request (application) for Court Judgment, received and filed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, exhibits and memorandum of costs worksheet, the Court rules in favor of the Cross-Complainants and against the Cross-Defendants: IMC and Interscaldes as follows:
Judgment for Pacific Aircorp 46945, Inc. against Cross-Defendants: Interscalades Management & Consultancy, NV ("Interscaldes") and IMC International Management Company, BV (IMC"), in the amount of $259,278.51; and Judgment for Pacific Aircopr 46944, Inc. against Cross-Defendants: Interscalades and IMC in the amount of $799,034.14, Costs $2,865.89 and Interest at the legal rate.
Judgment signed in open court.
